acceptance: No harness name checks in runner.go. TokenPattern and EffortFormat on Harness struct.
description: runner.go:103 has if harnessName==codex. extractTokens has switch on harness name. Breaks data-driven pattern.
title: Move token patterns and effort format to Harness struct

acceptance: Tests verify exact arg arrays for codex, claude, gemini with all flag combos (model, workdir, effort, prompt via arg and stdin).
description: No test verifies the exact args built for codex/claude/gemini given model, workdir, effort, prompt. Core logic untested.
title: Add arg construction tests for all harnesses

description: types.go:81 defines DefaultAutomation=auto but nothing references it.
title: Remove dead DefaultAutomation constant

acceptance: Run() calls resolveOpts(), buildArgs(), execute(), processResult(). Each method <30 lines.
description: Run() does 8 things: resolve, validate, build args, execute, time, error handle, extract tokens, log. Too many responsibilities.
title: Decompose runner.Run() into smaller methods

acceptance: Runner.Run() uses injected Executor. No direct exec.CommandContext calls in runner.go. Mock executor used in tests.
description: F-001: runner.Run() directly calls exec.CommandContext. Extract Executor interface (Execute ctx,binary,args,stdin -> stdout,stderr,exitCode,error). Inject real in prod, mock in tests.
title: Extract Executor interface from runner.Run() for testability

acceptance: agent log reads session_log_dir from runner config, not hardcoded default.
description: agent_cmd.go:248 hardcodes agent.DefaultLogDir. Ignores project config session_log_dir.
title: Fix agent log command to use runner config for session_log_dir

acceptance: TestIntegration_Codex and TestIntegration_Claude send trivial prompts and verify non-empty output. Skipped when binary not on PATH.
description: No test calls a real harness. Arg construction bugs ship undetected.
title: Add integration tests against real harnesses
